title: Bug in variable name for 'not all bits are asynchronously set or reset. This is not currently supported in synthesis'.

features.name: async reset with incomplete reset assignment in combinational block
features.description: Code should include a register with asynchronous reset where the corresponding next-state variable is not fully assigned in the combinational always block, causing incomplete reset coverage

features.name: unused next-state variable with async reset
features.description: Code should include a next-state variable that is used in a clocked always block with async reset but is never assigned in the corresponding combinational always block
